name: Developers Core Pack
description: Core AI skills for software developers covering code review, PR summarization, and shared utility capabilities. This pack is the entry point for the developer work stream.
author: ai-skills-maintainer

delivery_modes.instructions: Copy the skill definition from workstreams/developers/skills/code-review.md and paste it as a system prompt in GitHub Copilot Chat. Use @workspace and #file: references to provide code context.
POST to the portal API with skill_id and inputs payload. See docs/packaging.md for the request schema.
Register using the MCP tool definition generated from this package's entry_asset front matter.
Import as a Copilot Studio custom skill using the connector definition exported from this package.
Deploy the skill definition as a system prompt to your in-house LLM endpoint via the internal API layer.

configuration.additional_notes: Lower temperature produces consistent, structured code review output. Increase to 0.4 for more creative refactoring suggestions.

changelog.notes: Initial package with code-review skill, PR summarization prompt, and shared utility skills.
